data.body:
## Description

Create `tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh`. Tests create temp directory fixtures for Go (kubernetes-style: cmd/, pkg/, internal/, main.go), TypeScript (next.js-style: pages/, app/, next.config.js), Python (pyproject-style: src/, pyproject.toml, setup.cfg), and Rust (cargo-style: src/, Cargo.toml, build.rs). Default threshold: 5 (file list with 3+ known config/entry/wiring patterns exceeds this).

Tests: script exists/executable, known config files produce non-zero scores, deep paths score lower than shallow config, complex_override=true when score>5, complex_override=false when score<=5, layer_count equals distinct top-level dirs, change_type is valid enum (additive/subtractive/substitutive/mixed), 4 tech-stack fixtures scored correctly, empty input produces score=0 and complex_override=false.

TDD: RED — all tests fail since `plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py` doesn't exist.

### .test-index entry
`plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py: tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh [test_script_exists]`

### File Impact
- Create: `tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh`
- Edit: `.test-index`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh
- [ ] Syntactically valid bash
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh
- [ ] At least 10 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] Covers all output fields
  Verify: grep -q 'layer_count' tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh && grep -q 'change_type' tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh && grep -q 'complex_override' tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh && grep -q 'score' tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh && grep -q 'signals' tests/scripts/test-blast-radius-score.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'blast-radius-score.py.*test-blast-radius-score.sh' .test-index
